name: language-learning
description: Shows English grammar suggestions or Chinese-to-English translations for prompts before Claude Code processes them.

api_key.title: OpenAI-compatible API key
api_key.description: API key for the external model provider used to evaluate or translate prompts.

base_url.title: OpenAI-compatible base URL
base_url.description: Base URL for the provider, such as https://api.openai.com/v1 or another OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

model.title: Model
model.description: Model name accepted by the configured OpenAI-compatible provider.

inject_context.title: Inject suggestions into Claude context
inject_context.description: When false, suggestions are only shown to you as a system message and do not enter Claude's context.

timeout_ms.title: API timeout in milliseconds
timeout_ms.description: Maximum time to wait for the external model before letting the prompt continue without feedback.

max_prompt_chars.title: Maximum prompt characters
max_prompt_chars.description: Prompts longer than this are skipped to avoid sending large code blocks or logs to the external provider.

target_language.title: Target language (default: English)
target_language.description: The language to translate prompts into or check grammar against.
